---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability for HIVEMIND
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're facing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or improvement you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Explain how this feature would be used in practice. What agent workflows or swarm behaviors would it enable?

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, references, or links that support this request.
